title: デビュー戦の後に・進攻開始

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a successful debut, Symboli Rudolf sets her
sights on the Saudi Arabia R.C. to ensure that she
acquits herself well in the Classics.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even after the race is over, she upholds her pride
as the Emperor and the student council president
by taking both her press interviews and student
council duties in stride.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Such a capable Umamusume hardly has to rely on
a trainer at all, but in the name of our shared
dream, I resolve to do everything I can to support
her if she needs it.
